'''garuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pyonephrosis|pyonephrosis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-r-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pyonephrosis|pyonephrosis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| garuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gærichith|gærichith]] || [[word:gærichij|gærichij]] || [[word:gærichish|gærichish]] || [[word:gærichi|gærichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:garuruchuth|garuruchuth]] || [[word:garuruchuj|garuruchuj]] || [[word:garuruchush|garuruchush]] || [[word:garuruchu|garuruchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:garuchuth|garuchuth]] || [[word:garuchuj|garuchuj]] || [[word:garuchush|garuchush]] || [[word:garuchu|garuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:garufchuth|garufchuth]] || [[word:garufchuj|garufchuj]] || [[word:garufchush|garufchush]] || [[word:garufchuf|garufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:garuchuthu|garuchuthu]] || [[word:garuchuju|garuchuju]] || [[word:garuchushu|garuchushu]] || [[word:garuchuku|garuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:garuchuth|garuchuth]] || [[word:garuchuj|garuchuj]] || [[word:garuchush|garuchush]] || [[word:garuchu|garuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:garuchuthul|garuchuthul]] || [[word:garuchujul|garuchujul]] || [[word:garuchushul|garuchushul]] || [[word:garuchukul|garuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:garuchuthuthu|garuchuthuthu]] || [[word:garuchujuju|garuchujuju]] || [[word:garuchushushu|garuchushushu]] || [[word:garuchuku|garuchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:garuchuthun|garuchuthun]] || [[word:garuchujun|garuchujun]] || [[word:garuchushun|garuchushun]] || [[word:garuchukun|garuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:garuchuthuoro|garuchuthuoro]] || [[word:garuchujuoro|garuchujuoro]] || [[word:garuchushuoro|garuchushuoro]] || [[word:garuchukuoro|garuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
